frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; description 552 chars folded; > at L4 is YAML scalar marker; allowed-tools hyphenated; owns empty for guide skill; composes_with lists real local skills.

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Guide for creating and updating), 10 trigger keyword variants, proactive trigger statement.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 137 lines / ~550 words. No references/ directory (correct for reference-card scope). All workflow content self-contained.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered Workflow steps with imperative voice. Body Structure provides exact template. HEREDOC pattern shown with rationale. Pre-Push Checklist captures key gates.

coordination.notes: composes_with [git-commit, git-pr-feedback] both exist and are accurate pairings. spawned_by empty. owns correctly empty.

completeness.notes: All content self-contained. Title examples concrete. Body template inline. Workflow covers full PR lifecycle (create/update/status). No reference files needed.

anti_patterns.notes: Imperative voice. No emojis. Templates marked as adjustable. No explicit Anti-Pattern callout (sibling git-commit has one) — adding one would parallel sibling structure.

nits.item: owns.shared_read wildcard not needed for a gh CLI guide skill
Description uses > folded scalar with semantically-meaningless line breaks
nits.fix: Stylistic — consider single paragraph or | block scalar for uniformity.

nits.item: No explicit Anti-Pattern callout (sibling git-commit has one)
nits.fix: Append e.g. 'Forbidden: Pushing directly to main without a PR' for sibling parity.

nits.item: L33 cross-reference to git-commit lacks explicit path
HEREDOC template at L91-105 uses placeholder Summary/Test plan bullets
nits.fix: Add a note that real PRs should bring concrete bullets, not placeholders.

top_fixes.fix: Add an Anti-Pattern callout for sibling parity with git-commit
Add explicit path to git-commit cross-reference at L33
